case_title: M & E ENTERPRISE, INC. A CORP. DBA WINDSOR HOTEL vs. FERRELL, DAVE et al

docket_entries.description: DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ATNY D. PANCHAL PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFT DAVE FERRELL PRESENT IN PRO-PER. DEFT PAMELA RAE IS NOT PRESENT, HAS NOT ANSWERED, AND NO P.O.S HAS BEEN FILED. PLTF ORAL MOT TO DISMISS AS TO DEFT RAE IS GRANTED- PLTF TO FILE DISMISSAL. CASE SETTLED AS TO DEFT FERRELL; TERMS NOT ON RECORD. PLTF SUBMITTED PREPARED JUDGMENT WHICH WAS ALSO SIGNED BY PARTIES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERRELL, DAVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 238 EDDY STREET, ROOM #502, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL AUG-25-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & ATNYS FEES. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT OF $400 PLUS PER DIEM DMGS OF $13.33/DAY STARTING 7-2-96 & ENDING ON DATE DEFT VACATES ON OR BEFORE 8-25-96. PLTF TO FILE DISMISSAL ON UNSERVED DEF PAMELA RAE.
